examples: The ground had opened to disgorge a boiling stream of molten lava.
You owe me 5: come on, disgorge!
If the prey item is too big, the frog can simply disgorge its stomach and wait it out for the next meal.
Overloaded luggage carousels haphazardly disgorge bloated bags as waiting passengers elbow forward.
They're at New Delhi's Emporio mall, where herds of chauffeur-driven Jaguars and Audis disgorge shoppers heading to the Louis Vuitton and Christian Louboutin stores.
